title: A cool thing to do with Dreams - If you dream about someone let them know

transcript.text: I thought of a really cool thing to do about dreams today, and I think I shall do it as soon as I, next time I have a dream. The problem is I only remember the details of my dreams right when I wake up, so I need to have my camera there remembering to do it right when I wake up.

But like, yeah, cool thing to do with dreams is like whenever you have a dream with somebody you know in it, then you upload the story of your dream to the internet, or to YouTube, and then you email the person, you know, because you have Facebook now and MySpace and all this stuff where you're interconnected all the time.

And so then you send the person a message, and you go, and then you send them a link to the video, and you go, hey, I just had a dream about you, you should check it out, and then you watch the video.

And like, if everybody did that all the time, then, you know, like if you have a dream about a person like, say, or you know, let's say once a week, then that would mean once a week somebody's having a dream with you in it.
And the cool thing about that is, is maybe you're like, maybe you have the dream about each other in the same night.
So if you do that, or maybe not just upload a video, I mean, maybe you even have the same freaking dream, if you upload the video talking about the dream.
But also send a person a message, just go, hey, I had a dream about you that last night, and then maybe they had the dream too.

And maybe that'll help us figure out, be like a scientific way to help us figure out, like, if we actually, what dreams are, like, we actually are on some, like, dream world is actually a place where you go, um, and communicate telepathically.
So that'd be kind of interesting, huh?
Anyways, so there you go, my cool new idea.
